creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Kargl from comment #17)
> Perhaps, the comments needs an update, but I'm not sure to what.

The comment has "When the addends cancel to 0", which exactly mirrored the if condition. We could extend it to something like "When the addends cancel to 0 and ..." but that seems excessive. Perhaps just "Ensure the result has the correct sign ." which leaves a clue as to why the special case exists.
